source: representative_values; cross-checked against IQM Garnet whitepaper arXiv:2408.12433
note: Hardware-representative parameters used in the QubitPulseOpt paper and experiments. The IQM Garnet whitepaper (arXiv:2408.12433) reports T1 of the order of 40 us, median single-qubit gate error 9e-4 (fidelity ~99.91%), CZ fidelity ~99.5%, and median readout error ~3e-2. T2 (9.6 us) and anharmonicity (-200 MHz) are representative transmon values not separately published in that whitepaper; the live IQM calibration API was not accessible.
reference: M. Algaba et al., Technology and Performance Benchmarks of IQM's 20-Qubit Quantum Computer, arXiv:2408.12433 (2024)
